decision: The platform centrally defines what diagnostic settings have to be enabled, but applies them at the landing zone level — telemetry stays local to the application environment.
why: Without centrally defined diagnostic settings, the platform cannot guarantee that application data is routed to a Log Analytics workspace.

links.note: Must use a Config-prefixed assignment for diagnostic settings.
Diagnostic settings target only Azure native resources.

violations: Resource type added to allowedResources.json without a diagnostic settings definition.
